executiveSummary: The Nexus Digital Banking Dashboard represents a paradigm shift in omnichannel financial management, designed to empower retail and wealth management clients with unprecedented control over their financial ecosystems. By aggregating account overviews, real-time transaction histories, dynamic spending analytics, and comprehensive card and loan management into a single, highly intuitive interface, the platform eliminates friction and accelerates financial decision-making. This flagship enterprise product leverages cutting-edge microservices architecture and machine learning-driven insights to deliver hyper-personalized financial experiences. Furthermore, the platform ensures bank-grade security through multi-factor authentication, biometric integration, and end-to-end encryption, positioning the institution as a leader in secure, modern digital banking. The rollout will drive customer retention, increase digital engagement metrics, and significantly reduce operational costs associated with traditional branch banking.

userStories.story: As a bank customer, I want to view a consolidated dashboard of all my accounts so that I can quickly assess my total net worth and available liquidity.  Priority: High.  AC: 1. Display total net worth calculated in real-time. 2. Show individual account cards with masked account numbers, current balance, and available balance. 3. Include a visual sparkline chart for 30-day balance trends per account. 4. Ensure data loads within 800ms.  Description: The hero section of the dashboard must aggregate balances across checking, savings, credit cards, and investment accounts, presenting a unified financial snapshot with visual trend lines.  Priority: High.  AC: 1. Display total net worth calculated in real-time. 2. Show individual account cards with masked account numbers, current balance, and available balance. 3.
